basic_details.job_title: BRTC Chichpalli Recruitment 2026: Walk-in Interview for 21 Posts, Apply by 27 July
basic_details.organization_name: Bamboo Research & Training Centre (BRTC), Chichpalli, Forest Department, Govt. of Maharashtra
basic_details.short_information: The Bamboo Research and Training Centre (BRTC), Chichpalli, under the Forest Department, Government of Maharashtra, has released an advertisement for 21 posts on a purely contract/fixed-term basis. The posts span academic, administrative, technical, and support roles at the Centre in Chandrapur district. Eligible candidates must submit their applications on or before 27 July 2026.

qualification.details: post: Qualification & Experience (Essential) | head of department: Ph.D. in Mechanical or Civil Engineering and Technology/Design with First Class at Bachelor's or Master's level. Minimum 12 years' teaching/research/industry experience in Bamboo field, including at least 2 years post-Ph.D. experience in a leadership position, with proven research publications, funded projects and academic administration, as per AICTE norms wherever applicable. OR Bachelor's and Master's Degree in relevant discipline with minimum 15 years of experience in Teaching/Research/Industry, out of which at least 3 years shall be at the level of Lecturer (Selection Grade-II). | visiting faculty (basic science & mathematics): Bachelor's Degree/Master's Degree with First Class in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics with minimum 5 years' teaching/research/industry experience. Eminent academicians, industry professionals, entrepreneurs or retired Government officers with expertise in Bamboo Technology or other specialized subjects offered by the Centre will be preferred. | visiting faculty (english): Bachelor's Degree/Master's Degree with First Class English with minimum 5 years' teaching/research/industry experience. Eminent academicians, industry professionals, entrepreneurs or retired Government officers with expertise in Bamboo Technology or other specialized subjects offered by the Centre will be preferred. | it coordinator: B.E./B.Tech. or equivalent with minimum 2 years' experience. | pro / training & placement officer: Any Graduate with an MBA/PG Diploma in HR, Marketing, Public Relations or Mass Communication preferred and minimum 3 years' experience in Public Relations, Training & Placement or Industry Liaison. | junior accountant / office assistant: Bachelor's Degree in Commerce (B.Com.) with knowledge of Tally ERP, GST, MS Office and Government accounting procedures. Minimum 2 years' experience. | laboratory technician: Diploma in Bamboo Technology with minimum 2 years' laboratory/industry/teaching experience in bamboo OR any Diploma with 10 years' experience in Bamboo. | librarian: Bachelor's/Master's Degree in Library & Information Science (B.Lib./M.Lib.) with knowledge of library automation software and minimum 3 years' experience. | assistant course head: Bachelor's Degree (minimum four years) and preferably Master's Degree in the relevant discipline. Teaching/industrial experience in Bamboo Technology field is desirable. | supervisor (cfc): Graduate in any discipline (MSW/MBA preferred) with minimum 5 years' experience in administration, project coordination or institutional management. | assistant machine supervisor: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering or Production Engineering with minimum 3 years' experience in bamboo processing machinery and workshop operations. | designer / handicraft supervisor: Master's Degree in Design, Fine Arts, Handicrafts, Product Design or equivalent with minimum 3 years' experience in bamboo handicrafts or product development OR Bachelor's Degree in Design, Fine Arts, Handicrafts, Product Design or equivalent with minimum 6 years' relevant experience. | bamboo maintenance engineer: Diploma/Degree in Engineering/Technology OR Architect with minimum 5 years' experience in bamboo structures, construction and maintenance. Structural Engineer will be preferred. | civil engineer: Diploma/Degree in Civil Engineering with minimum 3 years' experience in construction and project execution. | electrical engineer: Diploma/Degree in Electrical Engineering with minimum 3 years' experience in electrical installations, maintenance and safety systems. | girls hostel warden: Female Graduate with minimum 2 years' experience in hostel administration, student affairs or institutional management. Experience may be relaxed for Ex-servicemen/retired Government personnel as per rules. | boys hostel warden: Male Graduate with minimum 2 years' experience in hostel administration, student affairs or institutional management. Experience may be relaxed for Ex-servicemen/retired Government personnel as per rules. | nursery supervisor: B.Sc./Diploma in Agriculture, Forestry, Horticulture or Diploma in Bamboo Technology. For Diploma, minimum 4 years' experience in nursery management, bamboo cultivation and plantation activities.

selection_process: The selection shall be made through interview / written test as decided by the Selection Committee.
how_to_apply: Download and fill the application in the prescribed proforma (Annexure-I).

Attach self-attested copies of all relevant documents: Educational Qualification certificates and mark-sheets, Experience certificates, Domicile certificate, Aadhaar card/PAN card, and a passport-size photograph.
Send the complete application to: The Director, Bamboo Research & Training Centre, Near Hanuman Mandir, Mul-Chandrapur Road, Chichpalli – 441224, Dist. Chandrapur, Maharashtra.
Ensure the application reaches the above address on or before the last date, 27 July 2026. Applications received after the due date shall not be entertained.
Candidates employed in Government/Semi-Government/Autonomous institutions must carry a No Objection Certificate (NOC) to submit at the time of interview.
For any queries, contact the office of BRTC, Chichpalli, on +91 9552729996 or via email at [email protected].

rows.details: Bamboo Research & Training Centre (BRTC), Chichpalli, Forest Department, Govt. of Maharashtra

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: BRTC Chichpalli Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: BRTC, Chichpalli has announced a total of 21 vacancies across four categories: AICTE/DTE Diploma in Bamboo Technology academic & administrative posts, Non-AICTE training staff, Common Facility Centre (CFC) manpower, and BRTC Campus support staff.

tables.caption: A. AICTE / DTE - Diploma in Bamboo Technology (Unaided) Course: Academic & Administrative Posts

rows.qualification_experience_essential: Ph.D. in Mechanical or Civil Engineering and Technology/Design with First Class at Bachelor's or Master's level. Minimum 12 years' teaching/research/industry experience in Bamboo field, including at least 2 years post-Ph.D. experience in a leadership position, with proven research publications, funded projects and academic administration, as per AICTE norms wherever applicable. OR Bachelor's and Master's Degree in relevant discipline with minimum 15 years of experience in Teaching/Research/Industry, out of which at least 3 years shall be at the level of Lecturer (Selection Grade-II).

Bachelor's Degree/Master's Degree with First Class in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics with minimum 5 years' teaching/research/industry experience. Eminent academicians, industry professionals, entrepreneurs or retired Government officers with expertise in Bamboo Technology or other specialized subjects offered by the Centre will be preferred.

Bachelor's Degree/Master's Degree with First Class English with minimum 5 years' teaching/research/industry experience. Eminent academicians, industry professionals, entrepreneurs or retired Government officers with expertise in Bamboo Technology or other specialized subjects offered by the Centre will be preferred.
B.E./B.Tech. or equivalent with minimum 2 years' experience.
Any Graduate with an MBA/PG Diploma in HR, Marketing, Public Relations or Mass Communication preferred and minimum 3 years' experience in Public Relations, Training & Placement or Industry Liaison.
Bachelor's Degree in Commerce (B.Com.) with knowledge of Tally ERP, GST, MS Office and Government accounting procedures. Minimum 2 years' experience.
Diploma in Bamboo Technology with minimum 2 years' laboratory/industry/teaching experience in bamboo OR any Diploma with 10 years' experience in Bamboo.
Bachelor's/Master's Degree in Library & Information Science (B.Lib./M.Lib.) with knowledge of library automation software and minimum 3 years' experience.
Bachelor's Degree (minimum four years) and preferably Master's Degree in the relevant discipline. Teaching/industrial experience in Bamboo Technology field is desirable.
Graduate in any discipline (MSW/MBA preferred) with minimum 5 years' experience in administration, project coordination or institutional management.
Diploma in Mechanical Engineering or Production Engineering with minimum 3 years' experience in bamboo processing machinery and workshop operations.

Master's Degree in Design, Fine Arts, Handicrafts, Product Design or equivalent with minimum 3 years' experience in bamboo handicrafts or product development OR Bachelor's Degree in Design, Fine Arts, Handicrafts, Product Design or equivalent with minimum 6 years' relevant experience.
Diploma/Degree in Engineering/Technology OR Architect with minimum 5 years' experience in bamboo structures, construction and maintenance. Structural Engineer will be preferred.
Diploma/Degree in Civil Engineering with minimum 3 years' experience in construction and project execution.
Diploma/Degree in Electrical Engineering with minimum 3 years' experience in electrical installations, maintenance and safety systems.

Female Graduate with minimum 2 years' experience in hostel administration, student affairs or institutional management. Experience may be relaxed for Ex-servicemen/retired Government personnel as per rules.

Male Graduate with minimum 2 years' experience in hostel administration, student affairs or institutional management. Experience may be relaxed for Ex-servicemen/retired Government personnel as per rules.
B.Sc./Diploma in Agriculture, Forestry, Horticulture or Diploma in Bamboo Technology. For Diploma, minimum 4 years' experience in nursery management, bamboo cultivation and plantation activities.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: The selection shall be made through interview / written test as decided by the Selection Committee.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required
content_sections.text: Educational Qualification certificates and mark-sheets Experience certificates Domicile certificate Aadhaar card / PAN card Passport-size photograph

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for BRTC Chichpalli Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download and fill the application in the prescribed proforma (Annexure-I). Attach self-attested copies of all relevant documents: Educational Qualification certificates and mark-sheets, Experience certificates, Domicile certificate, Aadhaar card/PAN card, and a passport-size photograph. Send the complete application to: The Director, Bamboo Research & Training Centre, Near Hanuman Mandir, Mul-Chandrapur Road, Chichpalli – 441224, Dist. Chandrapur, Maharashtra. Ensure the application reaches the above address on or before the last date, 27 July 2026. Applications received after the due date shall not be entertained. Candidates employed in Government/Semi-Government/Autonomous institutions must carry a No Objection Certificate (NOC) to submit at the time of interview. For any queries, contact the office of BRTC, Chichpalli, on +91 9552729996 or via email at [email protected] .

faq.question: Q1. Who is eligible for BRTC Chichpalli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligibility varies by post. For example, the Head of Department post requires a Ph.D. in Mechanical or Civil Engineering/Technology with 12 years of relevant experience (or a Bachelor's and Master's degree with 15 years of experience), while posts like IT Coordinator require a B.E./B.Tech. with 2 years' experience. The full post-wise qualification table is given above in this article.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for BRTC Chichpalli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of application for BRTC Chichpalli Recruitment 2026 is 27 July 2026. Applications received after this date will not be entertained.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for BRTC Chichpalli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any application fee for BRTC Chichpalli Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for BRTC Chichpalli posts?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify a salary or pay scale for any of the 21 posts. It only mentions that a suitable and desirable candidate will get a higher start.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for BRTC Chichpalli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection will be made through interview/written test as decided by the Selection Committee, as stated in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there a written exam for BRTC Chichpalli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The notification states that selection will be through interview/written test as decided by the Selection Committee, but it does not specify an exam pattern, syllabus, or marking scheme.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are there in BRTC Chichpalli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: BRTC Chichpalli has advertised a total of 21 vacancies across 17 post categories, including Head of Department, Visiting Faculty, Laboratory Technician, Engineers, Hostel Wardens, and Nursery Supervisors, among others.
